welcome.title: Welcome to our church
welcome.text: We are a family of faith, united in God's love, dedicated to serving our community and sharing the Gospel of Jesus Christ. Whether you are passing through or looking for a spiritual family, you are at home here.
welcome.text2: Our mission is to make disciples, worship God, and serve our neighbor with love.

cta.title: Join us this Sunday
cta.text: We would be honored to welcome you among us. Come experience a moment of faith, praise, and community.

schedule.title: Our Service Times
schedule.subtitle: Join us to worship the Lord and grow in His Word.

testimonials.title: Testimonials
testimonials.subtitle: Lives transformed by the power of God.

1.text: Since I set foot in this church, my life has radically changed. I found peace, brothers and sisters who supported me through difficult times. Glory to God!
1.author: — Sister Hadiza

2.text: The Wednesday evening Bible studies helped me better understand God's Word. I am grateful for the solid teachings we receive here.
2.author: — Brother Mamane

3.text: When I lost my job, the church mobilized to pray with me and supported me. God opened a door better than anything I imagined. Thank you to this family of faith!
3.author: — Brother Adamou

don.title: Support the Work
don.subtitle: Your donations help advance the Kingdom of God. Thank you for your generosity and faithfulness in supporting the church.
don.verse: May God bless you abundantly for your generosity! 2 Corinthians 9:7

page.title: About Us - AD Niamey 2000 | Our History, Mission and Vision

about.historyText: Founded in 2008 in the Yantala neighborhood of Niamey, AD Niamey 2000 (Assemblies of God of Niger) was born from the vision of Pastor Amadou Issoufou and a small group of believers eager to see the Gospel of Jesus Christ transform the Nigerien capital.
about.historyText2: What started as a prayer cell of 15 people is now a dynamic community of over 120 members. Our church is known for its commitment to Bible teaching, worship, intercession, and social work among the needy.
about.historyText3: We are affiliated with the Assemblies of God of Niger (ADN), a Pentecostal movement present in all regions of the country. Our vision is to make disciples who impact their generation through the love and power of God.
about.missionText: Proclaim the Gospel of Jesus Christ, make disciples, and serve our community with love and compassion.
about.missionPoint1: Lead souls to Christ through evangelism
about.missionPoint2: Make disciples through the teaching of the Word
about.missionPoint3: Serve our community with love and compassion
about.missionPoint4: Worship God in spirit and in truth
about.visionText: A church where every person meets God, grows in faith, and impacts their generation for Christ.
about.visionPoint1: A church of prayer and praise
about.visionPoint2: A church that grows and multiplies
about.visionPoint3: A church that impacts its generation

pastors.subtitle: Men of God dedicated to serving the flock.

1.name: Pastor Amadou Ousmane
1.bio: Senior pastor of AD Niamey 2000 since its founding. Doctor of theology, passionate about teaching the Word and training leaders.

2.name: Pastor Samuel Tchétché
2.bio: Associate pastor. Visionary, he leads the worship and intercession ministries.

3.name: Pastor David Yacoubou
3.bio: Youth pastor. Dynamic and creative, he leads the youth and teen ministry.

beliefs.title: Our Confession of Faith
beliefs.subtitle: The biblical foundations on which our faith rests.
beliefs.bibleText: The Bible is the inspired Word of God, our supreme authority in matters of faith and conduct.
beliefs.salutText: Salvation is by grace, through faith in Jesus Christ, the only Mediator between God and men.
beliefs.spiritText: We believe in the baptism of the Holy Spirit and His gifts that operate in the Church today.
beliefs.churchText: The Church is the body of Christ, a community of believers united in faith, love, and mission.

senior.name: Pastor Amadou Ousmane
senior.bio1: Senior pastor of AD Niamey 2000 since its founding. Doctor of theology, passionate about teaching the Word and training leaders.
senior.bio2: His ministry is marked by a deep pastoral anointing and a sincere love for God's people.
senior.bio3: Married and father of three children, he is a model of faith and integrity for the whole church.

associate.bio: Associate pastor. Visionary, he leads the worship and intercession ministries.

youth.bio: Youth pastor since 2018. He also leads the Wednesday Bible school.

team.title: Our Pastoral Team
team.subtitle: A united and diverse team serving God.

departments.title: Our Departments
departments.subtitle: Various ministries to reach every age group.

ministry.children.desc: A tailored program for our children with interactive Bible teachings.
ministry.youth.desc: Dynamic activities to shape the next generation of leaders.
ministry.men.desc: Gatherings to strengthen men in their role as spiritual leaders.
ministry.women.desc: A space of encouragement and growth for the women of the church.
ministry.music.desc: Worship at the heart of our church, with a team of dedicated musicians and singers.
ministry.mission.desc: Sharing God's love through local and international missionary work.

1.title: Youth Conference Generation Impact
1.desc: A large gathering of youth with inspiring teachings, workshops, and times of praise.

2.desc: Join us every morning for a time of prayer and meditation on the Word.

3.title: Community Baptism
3.desc: Registration is open for the next baptism at the Niger River.

4.title: Night of Praise
4.desc: A special evening of praise and worship.

commit1.desc: Our team prays for every request received each day.

commit2.title: Friday Intercession
commit2.desc: Every Friday, our intercession meeting brings your requests before God's throne.

commit3.title: Total Confidentiality
commit3.desc: Your requests remain strictly confidential between you and our prayer team.

prayer.verse: "Do not be anxious about anything, but in every situation, by prayer and petition, with thanksgiving, present your requests to God."
